title: Funckia alpina

It belongs to the genus Funckia, which is a group of plants that are native to the mountains of Central Asia. The classification of Funckia alpina is further divided into the kingdom Plantae, the clade Angiosperms, and the clade Eudicots. The plant is a perennial herb that grows in the mountainous regions of Tajikistan and other parts of the Pamir Mountains.
